title: Dispute
description: Represents a payment dispute filed by a customer against an Affirm transaction, including its current status, reason, and any evidence submitted by the merchant.

transaction_id.description: The identifier of the Affirm transaction being disputed.

charge_id.description: The identifier of the charge associated with this dispute.

reason_code.description: Standardized reason code categorizing the nature of the dispute (e.g., item_not_received, item_not_as_described, unauthorized).

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the disputed amount.

created.description: Timestamp when this dispute was created, in RFC 3339 format.

evidence_due_by.description: Deadline by which the merchant must submit evidence to contest this dispute, in RFC 3339 format.

closed_at.description: Timestamp when this dispute was closed, if applicable.

outcome.description: Final outcome of the dispute after review. Only set when status is won or lost.

evidence.description: List of evidence items submitted by the merchant for this dispute.
